title: pupilla heterophylla
intro: Pupilla heterophylla, also known as Pupilla minor, is a species of small, annual plants that belong to the family of Pupillaceae and are native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pupilla heterophylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy. Pupilla heterophylla is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to create a variety of herbal preparations.
